mediaItems.headline: Yes Bank reports rise in slippages; analysts flag asset-quality pressure in unsecured book
mediaItems.summary: Gross NPA ticked up QoQ on stress in the microfinance and personal-loan segments. Two brokerages moved to 'reduce'. Relevant to deposit exposure held under Meesho Limited and Technologies.

mediaItems.headline: RBL Bank under RBI lens over credit-card and MFI provisioning norms
mediaItems.summary: Regulator reportedly sought additional provisioning details. Stock fell 6 percent. RBL carries IPO-fund FDs - monitor for any rating watch.

mediaItems.headline: Mahindra Finance flags higher rural delinquencies amid uneven monsoon
mediaItems.summary: Management guided to elevated credit costs for the quarter. No rating action yet; bond exposure held under Valmo Transportation.

mediaItems.headline: IDFC First Bank NIM compression continues as deposit costs stay sticky
mediaItems.summary: Net interest margin narrowed for a third straight quarter. Small FD exposure only.

mediaItems.headline: HDB Financial Services sees modest uptick in two-wheeler loan delinquencies
mediaItems.summary: Within guided range; management called it seasonal. AAA rating affirmed by CRISIL last month.

mediaItems.headline: Bajaj Finance AUM growth moderates as it tightens unsecured underwriting
mediaItems.summary: Deliberate slowdown in unsecured lending; balance-sheet quality intact. AAA / stable.

mediaItems.headline: CRISIL reaffirms Tata Capital AAA/Stable on strong parentage and capital buffers
mediaItems.summary: Rating agency cited robust capitalisation and Tata group support. Largest single corporate-bond issuer in the book.

mediaItems.headline: SBI reports record quarterly profit; asset quality at multi-year best
mediaItems.summary: GNPA at decade low; strong deposit franchise. Large FD counterparty across entities.

mediaItems.headline: Aditya Birla Capital NBFC arm raises cost-of-funds guidance for FY27
mediaItems.summary: Funding-cost pressure noted but ratings unaffected. Held as both bond and liquid-MF exposure.

mediaItems.headline: Axis Bank flags slower fee-income growth; maintains stable outlook
mediaItems.summary: Largest single counterparty in the book (IPO + non-IPO FDs). No asset-quality concerns flagged.

mediaItems.headline: Kotak Mahindra Bank well-capitalised; CET-1 among the highest in sector
mediaItems.summary: Strong capital position reaffirmed. Significant IPO-fund FD counterparty.

mediaItems.headline: NABARD AAA reaffirmed; sovereign-backed development financier
mediaItems.summary: Quasi-sovereign credit, highest safety. Held via NCD.
